data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for processing state transitions (pending, processing, published, failed, dead-letter). However, the evidence provided does not confirm that all necessary state transitions are being tracked and managed appropriately, particularly for the BI plugin which ended up in the dead-letter queue. The linked use case indicates that while the WhatsApp plugin retries successfully, there is no evidence of a comprehensive handling of all state transitions for the BI plugin, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Insufficient evidence of state transitions for the BI plugin, particularly regarding its failure and dead-letter handling.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
